description_long: This kiosk consists of a tall, narrow, rectangular vertical panel with a vibrant orange geometric pattern and clear signage reading 'EZ TUBE CONNECT 36in STRAIGHT-96'. The panel is supported by two visible metal feet at the base, which rest on a square section of wood-patterned flooring. The structure appears lightweight and portable, likely constructed from a fabric or vinyl banner stretched over a tubular metal frame. There are no visible windows, doors, or interactive components aside from the signage. The overall design is modern and minimal, intended for use as a promotional or informational display in public or commercial spaces.
description: A tall, modern kiosk with a bright orange geometric banner and clear printed signage, supported by metal feet on a wood-patterned base. Designed for promotional or informational use, it features a sleek, minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full orange geometric banner with prominent signage and a person for scale.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the kiosk and the supporting metal feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the banner and the supporting structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the slimness of the kiosk and the base supports.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign on the front panel, integrated into the fabric banner, with visible text: 'EZ TUBE CONNECT 36in STRAIGHT-96'.
attribute_roof_design: Flat top, no overhangs or decorative elements, fabric or vinyl material.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with commercial display influences.
